framework.name: RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures for Agent Authentication
framework.description: TAP implements RFC 9421 compliant HTTP message signatures where each agent request carries cryptographic proof binding the agent identity to the specific merchant domain, exact page URL, operation type (browsing/payment), and temporal validity. CDN proxies intercept and verify signatures before requests reach merchant infrastructure.
framework.raw_quote: TAP Agent generates RFC 9421 compliant signatures... CDN Proxy intercepts and verifies agent signatures... Every request from a trusted agent is cryptographically locked to a merchant's specific website and the exact page with which the agent is interacting.

source.title: GitHub - visa/trusted-agent-protocol: Establishing a universal standard of trust between AI agents and merchants for the next phase of agentic commerce. · GitHub
